attrs.comment: Pixel offsets tracked using Imcorr. Input files were /snufkin/projects/cci/s2raw/s2raw/24WWU/2017-05-06/Seq00/B02.tiff and /snufkin/projects/cci/s2raw/s2raw/24WWU/2017-05-16/Seq00/B02.tiff. Intrinsic S2 shift (faulty georeferencing) estimated  as (x,y) = (0.3208, -0.2838) pixels. Shift was corrected. Pixel offsets converted to m/day using scaling dx_in_meters/dt_in_days = 10.0/10.0 = 1.0.
attrs.history:
2018-04-27 16:25:58 | Combined 1 input files ['/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/24WWU/2017-05-01_to_2017-05-15/2017-05-06_Seq00_to_2017-05-16_Seq00.nc'] by weighted average. Weights were cubed inverse RMS of velocity field. RMS was computed with 5x5 kernel.

2018-04-27 16:39:18 | Stacked in time from 5 input files ['/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/24WWU/2017-05-01_to_2017-05-15.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/24WWU/2017-06-30_to_2017-07-14.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/24WWU/2017-07-14_to_2017-08-01.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/24WWU/2017-08-02_to_2017-08-14.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/stacked/24WWU/2017-08-15_to_2017-08-29.nc'].
